import os
path = r'C:\Users\Revexn\Desktop\antigravity\seconde-exp'
# Step 1: List ALL top-level items
print('=== TOP-LEVEL ===')
for item in sorted(os.listdir(path)):
    fp = os.path.join(path, item)
    t = 'DIR' if os.path.isdir(fp) else f'FILE({os.path.getsize(fp)}B)'
    print(f'  [{t}] {item}')
print()
# Step 2: Check proverbs_extractor dir (likely location)
pe = os.path.join(path, 'proverbs_extractor')
if os.path.isdir(pe):
    print('=== proverbs_extractor/ ===')
    for item in sorted(os.listdir(pe)):
        fp = os.path.join(pe, item)
        t = 'DIR' if os.path.isdir(fp) else f'FILE({os.path.getsize(fp)}B)'
        print(f'  [{t}] {item}')
        if os.path.isfile(fp) and os.path.getsize(fp) < 50000:
            try:
                with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as fh:
                    c = fh.read()
                    if any(k in c.lower() for k in ['page_id','access_token','facebook','fb_page','graph.facebook']):
                        print(f'    *** FACEBOOK MATCH ***')
                        print(c[:3000])
            except: pass
print()
# Step 3: Check agent/ top level only (not skills/)
ag = os.path.join(path, 'agent')
if os.path.isdir(ag):
    print('=== agent/ top-level ===')
    for item in sorted(os.listdir(ag)):
        fp = os.path.join(ag, item)
        t = 'DIR' if os.path.isdir(fp) else f'FILE({os.path.getsize(fp)}B)'
        print(f'  [{t}] {item}')
        if os.path.isfile(fp) and os.path.getsize(fp) < 50000:
            try:
                with open(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as fh:
                    c = fh.read()
                    if any(k in c.lower() for k in ['page_id','access_token','facebook','fb_page']):
                        print(f'    *** FACEBOOK MATCH ***')
                        print(c[:3000])
            except: pass
description: قائمة المجلدات الرئيسية + فحص proverbs_extractor و agent
